summary: Full end-to-end testing of Flourish app. All 15 backend tests passed. Core flows: auth, onboarding, food rating (AI via Claude), diary logging, admin dashboard, affiliate submission all working. One UI issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the Profile tab nav button on mobile viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge (bottom-right fixed overlay) overlaps the Profile tab nav button on mobile (390px), making it unclickable with normal clicks. JS click workaround confirmed Profile tab renders correctly.

issues: Duration and challenge are combined on same screen (not 5 separate screens as spec says). Steps 3 and 4 are merged into one screen.
Score circle shows correctly (92 for blueberries). 'For Your Conditions' section shows paywall blur on some content - expected behavior for premium gating.

action_items: Fix 'Made with Emergent' badge z-index or positioning so it doesn't overlap the Profile nav tab on mobile. The badge covers the rightmost bottom nav button on 390px width.
Minor: Onboarding duration+challenge are on one screen together (not separate), which may differ from original 5-screen spec intent
critical_code_review_comments: Admin token uses simple string prefix 'admin_' + password which is insecure - consider proper JWT for admin
server.py is 1019 lines - consider splitting into routers
CORS wildcard (*) with allow_credentials=False may cause issues if frontend ever sends cookies

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Profile tab blocked by Made with Emergent overlay)

seed_data_creation: Created onboard_test_99@example.com for fresh onboarding test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows work. Main issue: Made with Emergent badge overlays Profile nav tab on mobile. Backend endpoints use: /api/profile (not /api/auth/profile), /api/diary/log (POST), admin uses X-Admin-Token header. Food rating AI takes ~20s. Paywall opens from crown icon top-right on home screen.
rca_of_issue: Profile nav click failure RCA: The 'Made with Emergent' Emergent branding badge is a fixed-position element (bottom-right) that overlaps the rightmost bottom navigation button (Profile) on mobile viewport (390px). Playwright's force=True also fails because the badge DOM element intercepts pointer events. JS click bypasses this and works fine. Fix: increase z-index of nav bar, or add pointer-events:none to badge, or ensure badge doesn't overlap nav.
